title: pelargonium × didymum
intro: Pelargonium × didymum, also known as Zwartkop or Black Beauty, is a hybrid plant species in the geranium family, native to South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu due to its high content of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × didymum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe sore throats and coughs, and its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used to make cough syrups, cold remedies, and other medicinal products.
